purpose: Consolidate existing Ethan-run external-boundary-condition and setup documentation into one reference package with a compact findings table.
evidence_scope: July 1 1D setup and closure bakeoff notes
read-only external Fluid configuration and solver source
mutation_scope: No OpenFOAM extraction, Fluid rerun, native solver output mutation, registry edit, or scheduler action.
key_findings: Existing documentation is thorough but fragmented across July 1 and July 8 artifacts.
Admitted Salt CFD rows are best labeled as 1.4 in layer present with surface-emissivity metadata and no exported qr/G radiation heat term.
CFD-informed comparisons should use realized heater and cooler wallHeatFlux at the fluid interface.
Current 1D defended setup is a 1.0 in radiation-on predictive-airside-HX surrogate, not a published global 1.4 in matched setup.
The current 1D cooler/HX path under-removes heat relative to CFD and is the largest thermal-state lever in fixed-mdot replays.
validation: Manual source read across listed artifacts.
CSV and JSON syntax checked with Python standard library.
